context: Hard: discount code validation has TOCTOU race allowing double-use, and fixed_amount discount can produce negative charge amounts

checklist.name: Catches TOCTOU race on discount usage
checklist.description: Identifies that validate_discount_code and decrement_discount_uses are separate non-atomic operations — two concurrent requests can both validate the same code (seeing uses_remaining=1), both succeed, and decrement it below zero

checklist.name: Catches negative charge amount
checklist.description: Identifies that apply_discount for fixed_amount type can produce a negative amount_cents (e.g., $5 discount on $3 charge = -$2.00), which could cause unexpected behavior at the payment gateway

checklist.name: Catches decrement-before-charge ordering
checklist.description: Identifies that the discount use is decremented before the charge call — if the charge fails, the discount use is consumed but the customer got nothing

checklist.name: Risk classified red
checklist.description: PR is classified as red due to financial logic with concurrency and correctness issues
